# Mini Leet

Open LeetCode problems within Acode editor! (Only Javascript supported for now).

## Features

* Search and Browse LeetCode problems in a native-themed sidebar app.
* Open problems into an acode file with description, starter code, and autogenerated test cases.

## Requirements

This plugin uses Acode's builtin alpine sandbox terminal in the background to fetch problems. Ensure the terminal works for proper plugin functionality.
